---
title: "Alpha-diversity"
subtitle: "Where we analyse the effect of a factor on local diversity"
date: last-modified
author:
  - name: Adrien Taudière
    url: https://adrientaudiere.github.io/bioinfo.starter/analysis/02_alpha_diversity.qmd
    affiliation: IdEst
    affiliation-url: https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0000-0003-1088-1182
citation: true
params:
  factor_of_interest: "Humidity"
# bibliography: bibliography.bib
# link-citations: true
---

```{r child="../R/styles.qmd"}
```

See the documentation of the `MiscMetabar` package for example of [alpha diversity analysis](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/MiscMetabar/articles/alpha-div.html). 


```{r}
if(base::interactive()) {
  params <- rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter(here::here("analysis/03_beta_diversity.qmd"))$params
}
factor_of_interest <- params$factor_of_interest
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(knitr)
library(targets)
library(MiscMetabar)
here::i_am("analysis/02_alpha_diversity.qmd")
source(here::here("R/styles.R"))
```

```{r}
d_pq <- readRDS(here::here("data/data_final/d_16S.rds"))
```


```{r}
#| error: true
hill_pq(d_pq, factor_of_interest, one_plot = TRUE) &
  (
    theme_idest(
      subtitle_size = 8,
      plot_title_size = 12,
      plot_margin = margin(5, 10, 5, 10),
      axis_title_size = 9,
      axis_text_size = 8
    ) + theme(legend.position = "none")
  ) 
```


```{r}
library("dabestr")

Hill_0_humidity <- psmelt_samples_pq(d_pq) |> 
  load(
   x = Humidity,
   y = Hill_0, 
   idx=list(c("H", "D"))
 ) %>%
   mean_diff() |>
 dabest_plot(swarm_label="Hill_0")
```

```{r}
Hill_1_humidity <- psmelt_samples_pq(d_pq) |> 
  load(
   x = Humidity,
   y = Hill_1, 
   idx=list(c("H", "D"))
 ) %>%
   mean_diff() |>
 dabest_plot(swarm_label="Hill_1")
```

```{r}
Hill_2_humidity <- psmelt_samples_pq(d_pq) |> 
  load(
   x = Humidity,
   y = Hill_2, 
   idx=list(c("H", "D"))
 ) %>%
   mean_diff() |>
 dabest_plot(swarm_label="Hill_2")
```


```{r}
library("patchwork")

Hill_0_humidity/Hill_1_humidity/Hill_2_humidity
```

```{r}
#| error: true
ggbetween_pq(d_pq, factor_of_interest, one_plot = TRUE)
```


## Agricultural practices

```{r}
library("dabestr")

Hill_0_practices <- psmelt_samples_pq(d_pq) |> 
  filter(Agricultural_practices%in%c("Lab", "Acs"))|> 
  load(
   x = Agricultural_practices,
   y = Hill_0, 
   idx=list(c("Lab", "Acs"))
 ) %>%
   mean_diff() |>
 dabest_plot(swarm_label="Hill_0")

Hill_0_practices
```
```

{{< include _session_info.qmd >}}
